_comment: Generate client certificates and extract fingerprints using:
_instructions: 1. Generate client cert: openssl req -new -x509 -days 365 -nodes -out client.crt -keyout client.key
2. Get fingerprint: openssl x509 -in client.crt -noout -fingerprint -sha256 | sed 's/://g' | awk -F= '{print "sha256:"tolower($2)}'
3. Add fingerprint to allowedFingerprints array above
